boundary_binding.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Export license LIC-SIE-073 exactly matches shipment SHIP-SIE-073 details (ECCN 3A991, Chile, Andes Labs) and is effective before export, per STD-SIE-073-P.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: License LIC-SIE-073 is effective before the shipment date.

final_answer: The export shipment may proceed. License LIC-SIE-073 precisely matches the details of shipment SHIP-SIE-073, including ECCN 3A991, destination Chile, and end user Andes Labs. This exact match satisfies STD-SIE-073-P, closing the source boundary.
